title: pouzolzia guineensis var. abyssinica
intro: Pouzolzia guineensis var. abyssinica is a variety of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pouzolzia guineensis var. abyssinica include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating pain, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Pouzolzia guineensis var. abyssinica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its various medicinal uses.
